literal.string: Encode a Hydra term to a JSON value given a type and type name. Returns Left for unsupported constructs.
expected maybe term for optional field
Encode a Hydra term to a JSON value without type information. Falls back to array-wrapped Maybe encoding.
unsupported term variant for JSON encoding:
Encode a Hydra literal to a JSON value
Encode a float value to JSON. Float64/Bigfloat use native numbers; Float32 uses string.
Encode an integer value to JSON. Small ints use native numbers; large ints use strings.

description: JSON encoding for Hydra terms. Converts Terms to JSON Values using Either for error handling.
